causes: Network issues, firewall, DB down, pool exhausted
solutions: Check connectivity, firewall, restart DB, increase pool size

pattern: Out of memory / Java heap space
causes: Memory leak, insufficient heap, large in-memory processing
solutions: Increase heap, fix leaks, paginate data, add memory monitoring

causes: Full disk, large logs, no rotation policy
solutions: Free space, log rotation, archive data, increase quota

causes: Bad credentials, expired token, wrong permissions
solutions: Verify credentials, refresh tokens, fix RBAC

pattern: API rate limit approaching or exceeded
causes: Traffic spike, missing backoff, low API tier
solutions: Throttle clients, exponential backoff, cache, upgrade plan

causes: Driver mismatch, wrong GPU visible, ROCm version skew, missing device
solutions: Verify rocm-smi, matching driver/stack, GPU passthrough, reinstall ROCm packages

causes: Firmware, KFD issues, incompatible kernel, GPU reset required
solutions: Check dmesg, reboot GPU, validate kernel+ROCm matrix, escalate to driver team

causes: Missing deps, wrong OS repo, version conflict, partial install
solutions: Run packaging test matrix, clean prior install, fix meta-package deps, validate repo config

causes: Fabric misconfig, wrong NIC, firewall, rank topology mismatch
solutions: Validate NCCL/RCCL env vars, IB/RoCE config, multi-node topology, firewall rules
similar_errors: Connection closed by peer during collective

pattern: PyTorch / training framework device error on ROCm
causes: Framework build mismatch, wrong torch-rocm wheel, OOM on GPU
solutions: Match torch+ROCm versions, reduce batch size, rocm-smi memory check

causes: Image drift, missing privileges, stale cache layer
solutions: Rebuild image, verify --device flags, rerun parallel matrix on clean containers

causes: Missing dep, wrong THEROCK_AMDGPU_FAMILIES, submodule/patch issue
solutions: Check cmake feature report, re-fetch sources, match GPU family flags

causes: Regression, flaky test, env/GPU not available in runner
solutions: Re-run shard, check GPU runner label, bisect commit

causes: Upstream step failed, timeout, runner issue
solutions: Open failed step log, check prior step stderr
